audit_items.proof_trace: The liveness gate at L425-427 (`if (auctionStart == 0 || elapsedTime > assetParams.auctionDuration) revert InvalidAuction`) is textually and logically prior to `_getAssetPrice` at L429 and `_getAssetOutAmount` at L442; no branch in `bid()` bypasses this check. The function has a single sequential control path from the reentrancy guard through the liveness gate to price computation and transfer.
